Who is Tony Stark

Tony Stark, also known as Iron Man, is a genius inventor and billionaire industrialist who suits up in his armor of cutting-edge technology to become the superhero Iron Man. He is the adopted son of Howard Stark and inherited his family's company, Stark Industries, at a young age. Tony Stark created a powerful suit of armor to escape from terrorists who had kidnapped him, and he later used this technology to become the superhero Iron Man, fighting for the betterment of the world and founding the Avengers team.
